title: Add MemAvailable field to MemInfo struct
body:
The MemInfo struct currently only exposes MemTotal and MemFree, but lacks MemAvailable. On Linux, MemAvailable (from /proc/meminfo) provides a more accurate estimate of how  much memory is actually available for new applications without swapping — it accounts for page cache and reclaimable slabs that MemFree ignores. MemFree alone can be misleadingly low on systems with active caching.

Required for https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/29116
